doc: v2.1.0 Phase C：手动维护的 bpy API 速查表（约 220 条精选）。server.js 启动时加载到内存，AI 通过 search_bpy_docs 工具模糊查询。每个 entry 都附 keywords / code / deprecated / see_also 字段，AI 不需要拼运行环境就能拿到能直接 exec_python 的代码片段。

entries.title: Bevel modifier — 倒角（4.2+ 推荐写法）
entries.code:
import math
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Bevel','BEVEL')
mod.affect = 'VERTICES'  # or 'EDGES'
mod.width = 0.03
mod.segments = 3
mod.limit_method = 'ANGLE'
mod.angle_limit = math.radians(30)
entries.deprecated: vertex_only=True 在 Blender 4.2+ 被移除，必须改用 affect='VERTICES'

entries.title: Subdivision Surface — 细分曲面
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Subsurf','SUBSURF')
mod.subdivision_type = 'CATMULL_CLARK'  # or 'SIMPLE'
mod.levels = 2          # viewport
mod.render_levels = 3   # render
mod.show_only_control_edges = True

entries.title: Array modifier — 阵列复制
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Array','ARRAY')
mod.count = 5
mod.use_relative_offset = True
mod.relative_offset_displace = (1.0, 0.0, 0.0)  # X 方向
mod.use_constant_offset = False
mod.use_merge_vertices = True

entries.title: Mirror modifier — 镜像
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Mirror','MIRROR')
mod.use_axis = (True, False, False)  # X / Y / Z
mod.use_clip = True
mod.merge_threshold = 0.001

entries.title: Solidify modifier — 给平面/曲面加厚度
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Solidify','SOLIDIFY')
mod.thickness = 0.04
mod.offset = -1.0   # -1=向内 / 1=向外 / 0=对称
mod.use_even_offset = True
mod.use_quality_normals = True

entries.title: Boolean modifier — 布尔运算（挖洞/合并）
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Bool','BOOLEAN')
mod.operation = 'DIFFERENCE'  # or 'UNION' / 'INTERSECT'
mod.object = cutter_obj
mod.solver = 'EXACT'   # 'FAST' 更快但 4.x 后偶发 NaN
mod.use_self = False

entries.title: Decimate modifier — 减面优化
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Decimate','DECIMATE')
mod.decimate_type = 'COLLAPSE'   # or 'UNSUBDIV' / 'DISSOLVE'
mod.ratio = 0.5  # 保留 50% 面数

entries.title: Displace modifier — 用贴图位移顶点
entries.code:
tex = bpy.data.textures.new('Noise','NOISE')
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Displace','DISPLACE')
mod.texture = tex
mod.strength = 0.5
mod.mid_level = 0.5
mod.direction = 'NORMAL'  # 'X' / 'Y' / 'Z' / 'NORMAL' / 'RGB_TO_XYZ'

entries.title: Wave modifier — 波浪动画
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Wave','WAVE')
mod.height = 0.2
mod.width = 0.5
mod.speed = 0.1
mod.use_x = True
mod.use_y = True

entries.title: Screw modifier — 螺旋/旋转扫掠（瓶子/螺丝）
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Screw','SCREW')
mod.angle = math.radians(360)
mod.steps = 32
mod.screw_offset = 0.0  # 0=单纯旋转，>0=螺旋上升
mod.axis = 'Z'

entries.title: Skin modifier — 由顶点骨架生成皮肤
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Skin','SKIN')
mod.use_smooth_shade = True
# 选定根顶点后 Ctrl+A 调整粗细
for v in obj.data.skin_vertices[0].data:
    v.radius = (0.05, 0.05)

entries.title: Shrinkwrap modifier — 贴附目标表面
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Shrink','SHRINKWRAP')
mod.target = target_obj
mod.wrap_method = 'NEAREST_SURFACEPOINT'  # 或 'PROJECT' / 'NEAREST_VERTEX'
mod.offset = 0.001

entries.title: Curve modifier — 沿曲线变形
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Curve','CURVE')
mod.object = curve_obj
mod.deform_axis = 'POS_X'

entries.title: Lattice modifier — 晶格自由变形
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.add(type='LATTICE', location=(0,0,0))
lat = bpy.context.object
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Lattice','LATTICE')
mod.object = lat

entries.title: Edge Split modifier — 锐边平滑分离（4.x 弃用，改用 Auto Smooth）
entries.code:
# 4.x 推荐改用 Object Data → Auto Smooth
obj.data.use_auto_smooth = True
import math
obj.data.auto_smooth_angle = math.radians(30)
# 5.x 已经移除 use_auto_smooth，改用 Shade Auto Smooth 算子
# bpy.ops.object.shade_auto_smooth(angle=math.radians(30))
entries.deprecated: 4.x: 仍可用但建议改 auto_smooth；5.x: use_auto_smooth 字段被移除

entries.title: Multires modifier — 多分辨率雕刻
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Multi','MULTIRES')
bpy.ops.object.multires_subdivide(modifier='Multi', mode='CATMULL_CLARK')

entries.title: Remesh modifier — 重新拓扑（体素/方块）
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Remesh','REMESH')
mod.mode = 'VOXEL'   # or 'BLOCKS' / 'SMOOTH' / 'SHARP'
mod.voxel_size = 0.05
mod.adaptivity = 0.01

entries.title: Triangulate modifier — 三角化
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Tri','TRIANGULATE')
mod.quad_method = 'BEAUTY'   # or 'FIXED' / 'SHORTEST_DIAGONAL'
mod.ngon_method = 'BEAUTY'

entries.title: Weld modifier — 焊接近距顶点
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Weld','WELD')
mod.merge_threshold = 0.0005

entries.title: Smooth modifier — 平滑顶点位置
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Smooth','SMOOTH')
mod.iterations = 5
mod.factor = 0.5

entries.title: Laplacian Smooth — 保形平滑
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('LapSmooth','LAPLACIANSMOOTH')
mod.iterations = 3
mod.use_volume_preservation = True
mod.lambda_factor = 0.5

entries.title: Cast modifier — 投射到基础体（球/柱）
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Cast','CAST')
mod.cast_type = 'SPHERE'   # or 'CYLINDER' / 'CUBOID'
mod.factor = 0.5
mod.radius = 1.0

entries.title: Hook modifier — 顶点钩到空物体（控制器）
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Hook','HOOK')
mod.object = empty_obj
# 通常配合 顶点组 use vertex group
mod.vertex_group = 'hook_vg'

entries.title: Cloth modifier — 布料模拟
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('Cloth','CLOTH')
mod.settings.quality = 8
mod.settings.mass = 0.3
# 需 collision modifier 在地面 / 障碍物上

entries.title: Collision modifier — 让布料/粒子碰撞
entries.code: obj.modifiers.new('Coll','COLLISION')

entries.title: Particle System — 粒子（草/树/雪）
entries.code:
obj.modifiers.new('Hair','PARTICLE_SYSTEM')
psys = obj.particle_systems[-1]
psys.settings.type = 'HAIR'
psys.settings.count = 1000
psys.settings.hair_length = 0.3

entries.title: Geometry Nodes modifier — 程序化几何
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('GN','NODES')
nt = bpy.data.node_groups.new('MyGN','GeometryNodeTree')
mod.node_group = nt
# 在 nt 里搭节点（见 gn-* 类条目）

entries.title: Volume Displace — 体积位移（液体/烟雾）
entries.code:
mod = obj.modifiers.new('VolDisp','VOLUME_DISPLACE')
mod.strength = 0.3

entries.title: Principled BSDF — 主流通用材质（4.x 输入索引）
entries.code:
mat = bpy.data.materials.new('MyMat')
mat.use_nodes = True
nodes = mat.node_tree.nodes
bsdf = nodes.get('Principled BSDF')
if not bsdf:
    bsdf = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfPrincipled')
bsdf.inputs['Base Color'].default_value = (0.8,0.2,0.2,1.0)
bsdf.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.4
bsdf.inputs['Metallic'].default_value = 0.0
bsdf.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 1.45
entries.deprecated: 4.x: inputs[7]/inputs[19] 等数字索引随版本变，必须用字符串名 inputs['Base Color']

entries.title: Emission — 自发光（灯带/屏幕/霓虹）
entries.code:
em = nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
em.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1.0,0.8,0.6,1.0)
em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 5.0
mat_out = nodes.get('Material Output') or nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
mat.node_tree.links.new(em.outputs['Emission'], mat_out.inputs['Surface'])

entries.title: Glass BSDF — 玻璃材质
entries.code:
g = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfGlass')
g.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1,1,1,1)
g.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.0
g.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 1.45
g.distribution = 'GGX'   # 合法值: GGX / MULTI_GGX / BECKMANN / SHARP

entries.title: Glossy BSDF — 金属/镜面
entries.code:
g = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfGlossy')
g.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.9,0.9,0.9,1.0)
g.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.2
g.distribution = 'GGX'

entries.title: Diffuse BSDF — 漫反射
entries.code:
d = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfDiffuse')
d.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.6,0.6,0.6,1.0)
d.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.0

entries.title: Translucent BSDF — 半透明（叶片/纸）
entries.code:
t = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfTranslucent')
t.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.4,0.7,0.3,1.0)

entries.title: Transparent BSDF — 全透明（用于 mask）
entries.code:
t = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfTransparent')
t.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1,1,1,1)

entries.title: Mix Shader — 两 BSDF 混合
entries.code:
mix = nodes.new('ShaderNodeMixShader')
mix.inputs[0].default_value = 0.5  # Fac
links = mat.node_tree.links
links.new(diffuse.outputs[0], mix.inputs[1])
links.new(glossy.outputs[0],  mix.inputs[2])

entries.title: Add Shader — 两 BSDF 叠加
entries.code:
a = nodes.new('ShaderNodeAddShader')
links.new(diff.outputs[0], a.inputs[0])
links.new(em.outputs[0],   a.inputs[1])

entries.title: Subsurface（Principled 内置）— 皮肤/蜡/果冻
entries.code:
bsdf.inputs['Subsurface Weight'].default_value = 0.3  # 4.x 改名为 Weight
bsdf.inputs['Subsurface Radius'].default_value = (1.0, 0.2, 0.1)
bsdf.inputs['Subsurface Scale'].default_value = 0.05
entries.deprecated: 4.x: 老的 'Subsurface' 滑块改名为 'Subsurface Weight'，输入名带空格区分

entries.title: Image Texture — 贴图节点
entries.code:
tex = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage')
tex.image = bpy.data.images.load('/path/to/diffuse.png')
links.new(tex.outputs['Color'], bsdf.inputs['Base Color'])

entries.title: Normal Map — 法线贴图
entries.code:
tex_n = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexImage')
tex_n.image = bpy.data.images.load('/path/to/normal.png')
tex_n.image.colorspace_settings.name = 'Non-Color'
nm = nodes.new('ShaderNodeNormalMap')
nm.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 1.0
links.new(tex_n.outputs['Color'], nm.inputs['Color'])
links.new(nm.outputs['Normal'], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])

entries.title: Bump — 凹凸节点
entries.code:
b = nodes.new('ShaderNodeBump')
b.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 0.5
links.new(noise.outputs['Fac'], b.inputs['Height'])
links.new(b.outputs['Normal'], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])

entries.title: Noise Texture — 噪波纹理
entries.code:
n = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexNoise')
n.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 5.0
n.inputs['Detail'].default_value = 2.0
n.inputs['Roughness'].default_value = 0.5

entries.title: Voronoi Texture — 蜂巢/裂纹
entries.code:
v = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexVoronoi')
v.feature = 'F1'   # or 'F2' / 'SMOOTH_F1' / 'DISTANCE_TO_EDGE' / 'N_SPHERE_RADIUS'
v.distance = 'EUCLIDEAN'
v.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 5.0

entries.title: Musgrave Texture — 多频段噪波（4.1+ 已合并到 Noise）
entries.code:
# Blender 4.1+ 起 Musgrave 节点已被合并到 Noise（Type=Hetero Terrain 等）
n = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexNoise')
n.noise_type = 'HETERO_TERRAIN'  # FBM / MULTIFRACTAL / HETERO_TERRAIN / HYBRID_MULTIFRACTAL / RIDGED_MULTIFRACTAL
entries.deprecated: 4.1+: 'ShaderNodeTexMusgrave' 已移除，改用 Noise + noise_type

entries.title: Checker Texture — 棋盘格
entries.code:
c = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexChecker')
c.inputs['Color1'].default_value = (1,1,1,1)
c.inputs['Color2'].default_value = (0,0,0,1)
c.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 8.0

entries.title: Wave Texture — 波浪/木纹
entries.code:
w = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexWave')
w.wave_type = 'BANDS'   # or 'RINGS'
w.wave_profile = 'SIN'  # SIN / SAW / TRI
w.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 5.0
w.inputs['Distortion'].default_value = 2.0

entries.title: Gradient Texture — 渐变
entries.code:
g = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexGradient')
g.gradient_type = 'LINEAR'   # LINEAR / QUADRATIC / EASING / DIAGONAL / SPHERICAL / QUADRATIC_SPHERE / RADIAL

entries.title: Sky Texture — 程序化天空（Nishita 阳光大气）
entries.code:
sky = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexSky')
sky.sky_type = 'NISHITA'  # 合法值: NISHITA / PREETHAM / HOSEK_WILKIE
sky.sun_elevation = math.radians(30)
sky.sun_rotation = math.radians(135)
sky.sun_intensity = 1.0
sky.altitude = 0.0
entries.deprecated: sky_type 是 ShaderNodeTexSky 专属枚举，不要把 NISHITA 用到 Volume Scatter.phase_function 上

entries.title: Environment Texture — HDRI 环境贴图
entries.code:
world = bpy.context.scene.world
world.use_nodes = True
nodes = world.node_tree.nodes
bg = nodes.get('Background')
env = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexEnvironment')
env.image = bpy.data.images.load('/path/to/sky.hdr')
world.node_tree.links.new(env.outputs['Color'], bg.inputs['Color'])
bg.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 1.0

entries.title: Volume Scatter — 体积散射（雾/丁达尔光柱）
entries.code:
vs = nodes.new('ShaderNodeVolumeScatter')
vs.inputs['Color'].default_value = (1,1,1,1)
vs.inputs['Density'].default_value = 0.1
vs.inputs['Anisotropy'].default_value = 0.0
# 注意：Volume Scatter 没有 phase_function 枚举（那是其它东西的），直接配 Anisotropy 标量
links.new(vs.outputs['Volume'], mat_out.inputs['Volume'])
entries.deprecated: 不要把 Sky Texture 的 NISHITA 枚举塞给 Volume Scatter，二者完全无关

entries.title: Volume Absorption — 体积吸收（彩色玻璃/液体）
entries.code:
va = nodes.new('ShaderNodeVolumeAbsorption')
va.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.5,0.8,1.0,1.0)
va.inputs['Density'].default_value = 0.5
links.new(va.outputs['Volume'], mat_out.inputs['Volume'])

entries.title: Color Ramp — 颜色渐变控制
entries.code:
cr = nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (0.1,0.0,0.0,1)
cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (1.0,0.8,0.5,1)
cr.color_ramp.interpolation = 'LINEAR'   # CONSTANT / LINEAR / EASE / B_SPLINE / CARDINAL

entries.title: Mapping + Texture Coordinate — 贴图UV变换
entries.code:
tc = nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexCoord')
mp = nodes.new('ShaderNodeMapping')
mp.inputs['Scale'].default_value = (2.0, 2.0, 2.0)
mp.inputs['Rotation'].default_value = (0, 0, math.radians(45))
links.new(tc.outputs['UV'], mp.inputs['Vector'])
links.new(mp.outputs['Vector'], tex.inputs['Vector'])

entries.title: Math Node — 数学运算节点
entries.code:
m = nodes.new('ShaderNodeMath')
m.operation = 'MULTIPLY'   # ADD / SUBTRACT / MULTIPLY / DIVIDE / POWER / MIN / MAX / GREATER_THAN / SINE / COSINE / ABSOLUTE 等
m.inputs[0].default_value = 0.5
m.inputs[1].default_value = 2.0

entries.title: Mix (Color) — 颜色混合节点
entries.code:
# 4.x: ShaderNodeMix 替代旧的 ShaderNodeMixRGB
mx = nodes.new('ShaderNodeMix')
mx.data_type = 'RGBA'
mx.blend_type = 'MULTIPLY'   # MIX / DARKEN / MULTIPLY / SCREEN / OVERLAY / ...
mx.inputs[0].default_value = 1.0  # Fac
mx.inputs[6].default_value = (1,0,0,1)  # A
mx.inputs[7].default_value = (0,1,0,1)  # B
entries.deprecated: 4.x: ShaderNodeMixRGB 仍可用但建议改 ShaderNodeMix(data_type='RGBA')

entries.title: Hue/Saturation/Value — HSV 调色
entries.code:
h = nodes.new('ShaderNodeHueSaturation')
h.inputs['Hue'].default_value = 0.5   # 0~1，0.5 = 无偏移
h.inputs['Saturation'].default_value = 1.0
h.inputs['Value'].default_value = 1.0
h.inputs['Fac'].default_value = 1.0

entries.title: Invert Color — 反色节点
entries.code:
iv = nodes.new('ShaderNodeInvert')
iv.inputs['Fac'].default_value = 1.0

entries.title: Separate/Combine Color — 颜色通道分离合成
entries.code:
# 4.x: ShaderNodeSeparateColor / ShaderNodeCombineColor 取代旧的 SeparateRGB/CombineRGB
sc = nodes.new('ShaderNodeSeparateColor')
sc.mode = 'RGB'   # or 'HSV' / 'HSL' / 'YCC' / 'YUV'
cc = nodes.new('ShaderNodeCombineColor')
cc.mode = 'RGB'
entries.deprecated: 4.x: ShaderNodeSeparateRGB / CombineRGB 仍可用，但推荐迁移到 Separate/CombineColor + mode 字段

entries.title: Material Output — 输出节点
entries.code:
mo = nodes.get('Material Output') or nodes.new('ShaderNodeOutputMaterial')
mo.target = 'ALL'   # 'ALL' / 'EEVEE' / 'CYCLES'
links.new(bsdf.outputs[0], mo.inputs['Surface'])

entries.title: RGB / Value — 颜色/数值常量节点
entries.code:
rgb = nodes.new('ShaderNodeRGB')
rgb.outputs[0].default_value = (1,0,0,1)
val = nodes.new('ShaderNodeValue')
val.outputs[0].default_value = 0.7

entries.title: Fresnel — 菲涅尔（边缘反光）
entries.code:
fr = nodes.new('ShaderNodeFresnel')
fr.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 1.45
links.new(fr.outputs['Fac'], mix.inputs['Fac'])

entries.title: Layer Weight — 视角加权（车漆/丝绒）
entries.code:
lw = nodes.new('ShaderNodeLayerWeight')
lw.inputs['Blend'].default_value = 0.5

entries.title: Displacement 节点 — 真位移（Cycles 微多边形）
entries.code:
disp = nodes.new('ShaderNodeDisplacement')
disp.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 0.1
links.new(noise.outputs['Fac'], disp.inputs['Height'])
links.new(disp.outputs['Displacement'], mat_out.inputs['Displacement'])
# 同时 mat.cycles.displacement_method = 'DISPLACEMENT' 或 'BOTH'

entries.title: Point Light — 全向点光
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='POINT', location=(2,2,3))
light = bpy.context.object.data
light.energy = 1000     # W (Cycles) / 4.x 与 EEVEE Next 同量纲
light.color = (1.0, 0.95, 0.9)
light.shadow_soft_size = 0.1
entries.deprecated: type 合法值: POINT / SUN / SPOT / AREA

entries.title: Sun Light — 平行光（阳光）
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='SUN', location=(0,0,10))
l = bpy.context.object
l.rotation_euler = (math.radians(45), 0, math.radians(30))
l.data.energy = 5.0  # SUN 的 energy 单位是 W/m²
l.data.color = (1.0, 0.95, 0.85)
l.data.angle = math.radians(0.526)   # 真实太阳直径 ≈ 0.5°

entries.title: Spot Light — 聚光
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='SPOT', location=(0,-3,4))
l = bpy.context.object.data
l.energy = 500
l.spot_size = math.radians(45)
l.spot_blend = 0.2

entries.title: Area Light — 面光（柔和阴影）
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='AREA', location=(0,-2,3))
l = bpy.context.object.data
l.shape = 'RECTANGLE'  # 合法值: SQUARE / DISK / RECTANGLE / ELLIPSE
l.size = 2.0
l.size_y = 1.0
l.energy = 300
entries.deprecated: shape 合法值: SQUARE / DISK / RECTANGLE / ELLIPSE

entries.title: 三点光布光（Key + Fill + Rim）
entries.code:
import math
# Key（主光，前上 45°）
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='AREA', location=(3,-3,4))
key = bpy.context.object; key.data.energy = 800; key.data.size = 2; key.name='Key'
# Fill（补光，对侧低强度）
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='AREA', location=(-3,-2,3))
fill = bpy.context.object; fill.data.energy = 300; fill.data.size = 3; fill.name='Fill'
# Rim（轮廓背光）
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='SPOT', location=(0,3,3))
rim = bpy.context.object; rim.data.energy = 600; rim.name='Rim'

entries.title: Light shadow 配置（EEVEE Next / Cycles 都生效）
entries.code:
light.data.use_shadow = True
# Cycles ray visibility
light.cycles.cast_shadow = True
light.cycles.max_bounces = 1024
entries.deprecated: 4.2+ EEVEE Next 用 use_shadow 控制，老的 use_contact_shadow 已合并

entries.title: Camera 基础（透视/正交/全景）
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.camera_add(location=(7,-7,4), rotation=(math.radians(65),0,math.radians(45)))
cam = bpy.context.object
cam.data.type = 'PERSP'  # 合法值: PERSP / ORTHO / PANO
cam.data.lens = 35       # mm
cam.data.sensor_width = 36
bpy.context.scene.camera = cam
entries.deprecated: type 合法值: PERSP / ORTHO / PANO

entries.title: Camera Depth of Field — 景深虚化
entries.code:

entries.title: bmesh.ops.spin — 旋转扫掠（车削/花瓶/酒杯）
entries.code:
import bmesh, math
from mathutils import Vector
bm = bmesh.new()
# 一条剖面线（顶点序列）
profile = [bm.verts.new((1.0+0.2*math.sin(i*0.4), 0, i*0.1)) for i in range(20)]
bm.edges.new((profile[0], profile[1]))   # 至少一条边触发 spin
for i in range(len(profile)-1):
    bm.edges.new((profile[i], profile[i+1]))
bmesh.ops.spin(bm, geom=bm.verts[:]+bm.edges[:], axis=(0,0,1), cent=(0,0,0), dvec=(0,0,0), angle=math.radians(360), steps=32, use_duplicate=False)
bmesh.ops.recalc_face_normals(bm, faces=bm.faces)
me = bpy.data.meshes.new('Vase'); bm.to_mesh(me); bm.free()
obj = bpy.data.objects.new('Vase', me); bpy.context.collection.objects.link(obj)

# Distribute Points + Instance on Points + ObjectInfo(rock_proto)

entries.title: NISHITA 正午时段（蓝天白云）
entries.code:
sky.sky_type = 'NISHITA'
sky.sun_elevation = math.radians(60)
sky.sun_intensity = 1.0
sky.air_density = 1.0
sky.dust_density = 1.0

entries.title: NISHITA 黄昏时段（橙红天）
entries.code:
sky.sky_type = 'NISHITA'
sky.sun_elevation = math.radians(5)
sky.sun_intensity = 0.7
sky.dust_density = 4.0   # 关键：高 dust 让红黄色调更浓

entries.title: 夜空（深蓝 + 月亮）
entries.code:
sky.sun_elevation = math.radians(-25)
# Sky 节点输出会很暗，叠一层深蓝 background
bg.inputs['Color'].default_value = (0.02, 0.04, 0.10, 1.0)
bg.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 0.05
# 月亮：单独 Sun light + 大 size
bpy.ops.object.light_add(type='SUN')
lt = bpy.context.object
lt.data.energy = 0.5
lt.data.color = (0.85, 0.92, 1.0)
lt.data.angle = math.radians(2)

entries.title: Sky 调色：ColorRamp 后期
entries.code:
# Sky → ColorRamp → Background
cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (1.0, 0.6, 0.4, 1)   # 远色
cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (0.5, 0.7, 1.0, 1)   # 近色
nt.links.new(sky.outputs['Color'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
nt.links.new(cr.outputs['Color'], bg.inputs['Color'])

entries.title: 世界级雾（World Volume）
entries.code:
world = bpy.context.scene.world
world.use_nodes = True
nt = world.node_tree
vs = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeVolumeScatter')
vs.inputs['Density'].default_value = 0.02
vs.inputs['Anisotropy'].default_value = 0.3
wo = nt.nodes.get('World Output')
nt.links.new(vs.outputs['Volume'], wo.inputs['Volume'])

entries.title: Volume Domain 设置（Cube 包体）
entries.code:
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cube_add(size=1)
obj = bpy.context.object
obj.scale = (40, 40, 5)   # 大 domain
bpy.ops.object.transform_apply(scale=True)
obj.display_type = 'WIRE'
# 然后赋 Volume 材质（VolumeScatter / VolumePrincipled）

entries.title: Ocean modifier 海洋
entries.code:
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_plane_add(size=20)
obj = bpy.context.object
m = obj.modifiers.new('Ocean','OCEAN')
m.spatial_size = 20
m.choppiness = 1.5
m.depth = 100

entries.title: 焦散假效（Voronoi 投光）
entries.code:
# Cycles 真焦散开 cycles.use_caustics_*
# 假焦散：在地面 plane 上贴 Voronoi 自发光
v = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexVoronoi')
v.feature = 'DISTANCE_TO_EDGE'
v.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 8.0
# 接 Emission

entries.title: 倒影 plane（双层水面）
entries.code:
# 上层透明水 + 下层镜面 plane
# 上层：Roughness=0.05 / Transmission=1
# 下层：Metallic=1 / Roughness=0
# 中间填半透白色 noise mask 做波纹

entries.title: 水面法线扰动：Wave → Bump → Normal
entries.code:
wave = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeTexWave')
wave.wave_type = 'BANDS'
wave.inputs['Scale'].default_value = 8.0
wave.inputs['Distortion'].default_value = 5.0
bump = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBump')
bump.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 0.1
nt.links.new(wave.outputs['Fac'], bump.inputs['Height'])
nt.links.new(bump.outputs['Normal'], bsdf.inputs['Normal'])

entries.title: 河流（Curve 弯道 + Bevel + 水材质）
entries.code:
bpy.ops.curve.primitive_bezier_curve_add()
cv = bpy.context.object
cv.data.dimensions = '2D'
cv.data.bevel_depth = 1.0   # 河宽
cv.data.fill_mode = 'BOTH'

entries.title: GN：Distribute Points on Faces
entries.code:
dp = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeDistributePointsOnFaces')
dp.inputs['Density'].default_value = 100.0   # 每平米点数
# Mesh in → Points out

entries.title: GN：Curve Line（电线/绳子骨架）
entries.code:
cl = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeCurvePrimitiveLine')
cl.inputs['Start'].default_value = (0,0,0)
cl.inputs['End'].default_value = (10,0,0)

entries.title: GN：Geometry Proximity（与目标距离）
entries.code:
gp = nt.nodes.new('GeometryNodeProximity')
gp.target_element = 'FACES'
# 距离值可驱动 Density / Scale

entries.title: Particle Hair 静态草地（旧 API）
entries.code:
obj.modifiers.new('Hair','PARTICLE_SYSTEM')
psys = obj.particle_systems[-1]
s = psys.settings
s.type = 'HAIR'
s.count = 1000
s.hair_length = 0.3
s.render_type = 'OBJECT'
s.instance_object = blade_obj

entries.code:

m = obj.modifiers['Fluid']
m.fluid_type = 'DOMAIN'
m.domain_settings.domain_type = 'GAS'

entries.title: 自发光强度速查表（cycles/EEVEE 同量纲）
entries.code:
# 太阳: 100~1000+
# 灯泡: 5~30

# 霓虹: 8~20

# 萤火虫: 5~15（小 mesh + 高 strength）
em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 10.0

entries.title: 自发光双重兼容（Emission / Emission Color）

entries.title: 局部自发光（Mix Shader）
entries.code:
# 用 mask（Voronoi/Image）混合 BSDF + Emission

entries.title: Toon BSDF（Cycles 卡通）

t.component = 'DIFFUSE'   # or 'GLOSSY'

entries.title: Cel-shading：阶梯化 ColorRamp
entries.code:
# Diffuse → ColorRamp(CONSTANT 插值) → BSDF
di = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeBsdfDiffuse')
cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
cr.color_ramp.interpolation = 'CONSTANT'   # ★ 关键
cr.color_ramp.elements[0].color = (0.5, 0.4, 0.4, 1)   # 暗
cr.color_ramp.elements[1].color = (1.0, 0.95, 0.9, 1) # 亮

entries.title: 卡通描边：Solidify + Backface Cull
entries.code:
m = obj.modifiers.new('Outline','SOLIDIFY')
m.thickness = -0.01   # 负值朝内
m.offset = 1.0
m.use_flip_normals = True
# 第二个材质 slot：纯黑 + 关 backface
black_mat = bpy.data.materials.new('outline')
black_mat.use_nodes = True
black_mat.use_backface_culling = True

entries.title: 卡通 Rim Light（Fresnel + Emission）
entries.code:
fr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeFresnel')
fr.inputs['IOR'].default_value = 2.5
cr = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeValToRGB')
cr.color_ramp.interpolation = 'CONSTANT'
em = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeEmission')
em.inputs['Strength'].default_value = 2.0
# fresnel → ramp(constant) → mix shader fac → bsdf+emission

entries.title: 卡通阴影：Diffuse Shader To Color → Ramp
entries.code:
# 经典 cel：用 Diffuse + ShaderToRGB（EEVEE only）
s2c = nt.nodes.new('ShaderNodeShaderToRGB')
nt.links.new(diffuse.outputs[0], s2c.inputs[0])
nt.links.new(s2c.outputs['Color'], cr.inputs['Fac'])
entries.deprecated: ShaderToRGB 仅 EEVEE 支持

entries.title: 用 Empty 做 parent 整体管理
entries.code:
bpy.ops.object.empty_add(type='PLAIN_AXES', location=(0,0,0))
root = bpy.context.object; root.name = 'MyAssembly_root'
for p in parts:
    p.parent = root
    p.matrix_parent_inverse = root.matrix_world.inverted()

entries.title: ⚠️ plan_update_step 必须传纯数字 step_id（图 3 治根）
entries.code:
# ❌ 错的：step_id='4 एक्टिंग}' / step_id='step-1' / step_id='第 1 步'
# ✓ 对的：step_id='1' / step_id='2' / step_id='3'
# v2.1 H-Hotfix5 起前端会强制正则 /^\d+$/ 校验，传杂字符直接 ok:false
plan_update_step({step_id: '1', status: 'in_progress'})
# 不知道当前 step 列表？先调 plan_get() 拿
plan_get()
